title: Joy Is On The Way
html: [Intro] G Em7 D Am7 C7M G7M G7M/B C7M G7M Oh please, oh please, don’t cry G7M/B This dry land will become C7M A blooming garden G7M Oh please, lift up your eyes G7M/B You’ll see the Sun will rise C7M On the horizon C D G/B Remember the days of your youth C D G/B Remember every promise to you C D This is not the end Em7 A/C# It’s just a chapter in the story C D G7M G7M/B C7M Joy is on the way G7M Oh please, oh please, remind G7M/B Yourself of all the things C7M He placed inside you G7M It’s worth enduring the fight G7M/B C7M To see the great unfolding of your destiny C D G/B Remember the days of your youth C D G/B Remember every promise to you C D This is not the end Em7 A/C# It’s just a chapter in the story C D G7M G7M/B C7M Joy is on the way ( C Em7 C D ) ( Em7 A/C# C ) ( D G4 G ) C D You will see the hand G7M/B That has formed your being C D You will hear the voice G7M/B That has called your name C D Em7 A/C# And He will say that joy is on the way C D G7M G7M/B C7M Joy is on the way G7M G7M/B The future will be bright C7M All of your tears will dry and hope will triumph G7M The day will soon arrive G7M/B C7M When all your suffering will be behind you
